description: Setup / First-Run Experience - pyproject.toml, setup_check.py validation script, --check flag in runner.py, updated QUICKSTART.md with proper install instructions.
steps: Create pyproject.toml with: [project] metadata (name='ai-coding-guidance-skills', version='0.1.0', requires-python='>=3.11', dependencies=['pyyaml>=6.0']), [project.optional-dependencies] dev=['pytest>=7.0','pytest-cov>=4.0'], [tool.pytest.ini_options] testpaths=['tests']

Create setup_check.py as a standalone script with class SetupChecker containing: check_python_version() -> tuple[bool, str] (>= 3.11), check_pyyaml_installed() -> tuple[bool, str], check_kernel_files_present() -> tuple[bool, str] (verifies graph.yaml, state.yaml, BOOT.md, constitution.md exist), check_graph_loadable() -> tuple[bool, str] (tries to yaml.safe_load graph.yaml and validates 'nodes' key), check_skill_paths() -> tuple[bool, str] (reads _index.yaml, verifies each skill path resolves to a dir with SKILL.md), run_all_checks() -> list[dict] (returns list of {check, passed, message})

Add --check flag to runner.py that imports and runs setup_check.SetupChecker, prints colored pass/fail results, and exits with code 0 if all pass or 1 if any fail. Make --goal not required when --check is used.
Update QUICKSTART.md with proper install instructions: git clone, cd, pip install -e '.[dev]', python3.12 runner.py --check, then the existing quick start steps
Create tests/test_setup_check.py testing all checker methods with tmp_path fixtures (valid setup, missing files, bad graph yaml, broken skill paths, python version check)
Ensure tests pass and coverage stays >= 90%
acceptance_criteria: pyproject.toml exists with correct metadata, dependencies, and tool config
setup_check.py exists with SetupChecker class and all 5 check methods plus run_all_checks
runner.py --check runs all checks and exits appropriately
QUICKSTART.md has proper pip install -e instructions
All tests pass with python3.12 -m pytest tests/ --cov --cov-fail-under=90 -q
findings: All 585 tests pass with 98.65% coverage. Created pyproject.toml, setup_check.py (works both standalone and as importable module), added --check to runner.py with --goal made optional for --check usage, updated test_runner.py to adapt to new --goal behavior (not required at argparse level, validated in main()), updated QUICKSTART.md with Installation section. 25 new tests in test_setup_check.py plus 3 new tests in test_runner.py.
